title: 3D Redstone Wires
description: Makes Redstone connect in a smooth 3D way
body:
Makes Redstone able to go diagonal while also being a solid 3D line for easier view of Redstone contraption layouts

# Downloading
### **Modrinth does not show all of the resource pack variants, please download from the [Versions Page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gn-redstone3d/versions) to be able to pick from the variants.**
- Normal variant
- Numbered variant
- Dot as paw variant
***
> ### Note
> To avoid redundant uploading of the same resource pack but with one number changed, some resource packs will show up as incompatible with the current version you are in, but do work fine.\
> We recommend using [No Resource Pack Warnings](https://modrinth.com/mods?q=No+Resource+Pack+Warnings) to remove the annoyance.
